title: Fractured Expiration
description: This is a smol Modpack to optimize and enhance your experience with The Broken Script.
body: ![Fractured Expiration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rquzMwhH/images/0ec85cfdb22ecf642c6e8b0c1d023c9f74ecfe18.png) **Fractured Expiration** is a modpack featuring the mod "[The broken script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)". This is a horror mod. This modpack takes that mod to the next level. # Features - **[The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)** – For the best horror expiranse. - **Shaders** – For an enhanced creepy experience. - **Optimization** – Some optimization mods for a better experience. # Installation (Modrinth App) 1. **Download & Install** the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app). 2. **Login** with your Minecraft account. 3. **Browse** on the left sidebar. 4. **Search** for The Broken Script Plus. 5. **Download & Install** the first result. # Credits This project is part of **Membercat Studios** by **KasaiSora**. [](https://membercat.com) This mod is part of **Membercat Studios** by KasaiSora and has been created by: - **Domplanto**: Project Manager - **KasaiSora**: Streamer To report any issues, receive support or tell us your feedback, join our [Discord Server](https://dc.kasai.gg).
